dashboard.publicTitle: Your Catholic media ministry starts here
dashboard.publicDescription: Join a verified network of Catholic creators, clergy, parishes, and media collaborators.
dashboard.adminDescription: Review registry health, member activity, content, and upcoming ministry priorities from one place.
dashboard.memberDescription: Keep your public ministry profile current, discover collaborators, and stay ready for upcoming events.
dashboard.identityDescription: A verified profile helps dioceses and parishes coordinate trusted media work.

form.invalidDate: Enter a valid date in dd-mm-yyyy format.
form.futureDate: Date of birth cannot be in the future.
form.biographyReady: Biography drafts are ready for your review.
form.biographyFallback: AI is unavailable, so reliable local drafts were created.
form.reviewBeforeSubmit: Review and edit before submitting for approval.

approval.title: Pending approvals
approval.description: Nothing is published until an authorized administrator approves it.
approval.clearDescription: New profiles, edits, events, announcements, and AI-assisted drafts will appear here.
approval.reviewPlaceholder: Optional approval note or clear revision guidance

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: Approval decisions, profile changes, events, and reminders will appear here.

reflection.unavailable: Today's reflection could not be loaded.
